requirement_topic.en: PV Inverter Performance — Efficiency, Power Quality, and Output Characteristics
requirement_topic.zh: 光伏逆变器性能——效率、电能质量及输出特性
requirement_topic.zht: 光伏逆變器性能——效率、電能質量及輸出特性

summary.en: Myanmar has no published national mandatory performance standard for PV inverter efficiency, power quality, or output characteristics equivalent to a formal product regulation. MEPE and ESE may specify minimum inverter performance parameters in project-level grid-interconnection agreements on a case-by-case basis, typically referencing IEC 61727:2004 (PV systems — characteristics of the utility interface) for power quality parameters such as power factor, harmonics, DC injection, and voltage/frequency operating range. The nominal grid parameters are 230 V ±10%, 50 Hz ±1 Hz for the distribution network. No formal Myanmar-specific minimum efficiency standard or CEC/EU weighted-efficiency equivalent has been identified in publicly available sources. MSTRD voluntary standards may incorporate relevant IEC performance requirements, but a specific mandatory performance catalogue for PV inverters has not been confirmed.
summary.zh: 缅甸没有发布与正式产品法规等同的光伏逆变器效率、电能质量或输出特性的强制性国家性能标准。MEPE和ESE可能在项目层面并网协议中逐案规定最低逆变器性能参数，通常引用IEC 61727:2004（光伏系统——公用电网接口特性），涵盖功率因数、谐波、直流注入及电压/频率工作范围等电能质量参数。配电网额定参数为230 V±10%、50 Hz±1 Hz。公开来源中未发现正式的缅甸专属最低效率标准或CEC/EU加权效率等效要求。MSTRD自愿性标准可能纳入了相关IEC性能要求，但尚未确认针对光伏逆变器的具体强制性性能目录。
summary.zht: 緬甸沒有發布與正式產品法規等同的光伏逆變器效率、電能質量或輸出特性的強制性國家性能標準。MEPE和ESE可能在項目層面並網協議中逐案規定最低逆變器性能參數，通常引用IEC 61727:2004（光伏系統——公用電網接口特性），涵蓋功率因數、諧波、直流注入及電壓/頻率工作範圍等電能質量參數。配電網額定參數為230 V±10%、50 Hz±1 Hz。公開來源中未發現正式的緬甸專屬最低效率標準或CEC/EU加權效率等效要求。MSTRD自願性標準可能納入了相關IEC性能要求，但尚未確認針對光伏逆變器的具體強制性性能目錄。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61727:2004 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems: Characteristics of the utility interface (referenced by MEPE for project-level power quality parameters)

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter performance requirements are primarily covered by GB/T 37408-2019 (recommended, technical requirements for PV grid-connected inverters, covering efficiency, power factor, harmonic current limits, DC injection, voltage/frequency operating range, and MPPT performance) and by CGC/GF 004 (CGC voluntary efficiency and performance certification standard for PV inverters). The CGC certification scheme includes efficiency measurements at multiple load points and MPPT tracking tests. China's nominal grid output for PV inverters is 220 V / 50 Hz (single-phase) or 380 V / 50 Hz (three-phase); the 10 V nominal difference from Myanmar's 230 V must be verified for each specific product model's configurable voltage range.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器性能要求主要由GB/T 37408-2019（推荐性，光伏并网逆变器技术要求，涵盖效率、功率因数、谐波电流限值、直流注入、电压/频率工作范围及MPPT性能）和CGC/GF 004（CGC光伏逆变器自愿性效率与性能认证标准）涵盖。CGC认证方案包括多个负载点的效率测量和MPPT跟踪测试。中国光伏逆变器额定并网输出为220 V/50 Hz（单相）或380 V/50 Hz（三相）；与缅甸230 V之间10 V的额定值差异须针对每个具体产品型号的可配置电压范围逐一核实。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器性能要求主要由GB/T 37408-2019（推薦性，光伏並網逆變器技術要求，涵蓋效率、功率因數、諧波電流限值、直流注入、電壓/頻率工作範圍及MPPT性能）和CGC/GF 004（CGC光伏逆變器自願性效率與性能認證標準）涵蓋。CGC認證方案包括多個負載點的效率測量和MPPT跟踪測試。中國光伏逆變器額定並網輸出為220 V/50 Hz（單相）或380 V/50 Hz（三相）；與緬甸230 V之間10 V的額定值差異須針對每個具體產品型號的可配置電壓範圍逐一核實。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — Technical requirements for PV grid-connected inverters (recommended, incl. efficiency, power factor, harmonics, MPPT)
CGC/GF 004 — CGC voluntary PV inverter efficiency and performance certification standard

gap.en: There is no formal Myanmar performance standard creating a mandatory compliance gap. The practical gap is voltage-nominal compatibility: Myanmar's 230 V distribution nominal vs China's 220 V domestic standard. Most modern Chinese PV inverters support a configurable AC output voltage range (typically 180–270 V or wider) that accommodates 230 V operation — but this must be explicitly confirmed per product model. Power quality requirements (power factor ≥ 0.99 at rated load, THD-I < 5% under IEC 61727) that Chinese manufacturers already meet for domestic CGC certification align with what MEPE expects in project-level reviews. No Myanmar mandatory efficiency minimum creates an additional test obligation beyond what CGC-certified Chinese products already carry.
gap.zh: 缅甸没有正式的性能标准产生强制性合规差距。实际差距在于电压额定值兼容性：缅甸配电网额定230 V vs中国国内标准220 V。大多数现代中国光伏逆变器支持可配置的交流输出电压范围（通常为180–270 V或更宽），可兼容230 V运行——但须针对具体产品型号明确确认。中国制造商为满足CGC国内认证而已达到的电能质量要求（额定负载功率因数≥0.99，IEC 61727下THD-I<5%）与MEPE在项目层面审查中的期望一致。缅甸没有强制性最低效率要求，不会对CGC认证的中国产品产生超出现有认证之外的额外测试义务。
gap.zht: 緬甸沒有正式的性能標準產生強制性合規差距。實際差距在於電壓額定值兼容性：緬甸配電網額定230 V vs中國國內標準220 V。大多數現代中國光伏逆變器支持可配置的交流輸出電壓範圍（通常為180–270 V或更寬），可兼容230 V運行——但須針對具體產品型號明確確認。中國製造商為滿足CGC國內認證而已達到的電能質量要求（額定負載功率因數≥0.99，IEC 61727下THD-I<5%）與MEPE在項目層面審查中的期望一致。緬甸沒有強制性最低效率要求，不會對CGC認證的中國產品產生超出現有認證之外的額外測試義務。

mandatory_status.target: No mandatory national performance standard for PV inverters confirmed in Myanmar as of access date. IEC 61727 parameters applied procedurally in MEPE project-level approvals.
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended (GB/T 37408-2019, CGC/GF 004). De facto required for State Grid/CSG connection approval and CGC market-differentiation certification.

source.publisher: Ministry of Electricity and Energy (MOEE), Myanmar

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Myanmar imposes no mandatory efficiency or power-quality performance standard on imported PV inverters as of the access date. The voltage-nominal compatibility with 230 V / 50 Hz must be confirmed per product model. CGC-certified Chinese inverters with IEC 61727 power quality test results are well-positioned for MEPE project-level approval. This comparison is informational only.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至查询日期，缅甸对进口光伏逆变器没有强制性的效率或电能质量性能标准。须针对具体产品型号确认与230 V/50 Hz的电压额定值兼容性。持有IEC 61727电能质量测试报告的CGC认证中国逆变器在MEPE项目层面审批中处于有利地位。本比较仅供参考。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至查詢日期，緬甸對進口光伏逆變器沒有強制性的效率或電能質量性能標準。須針對具體產品型號確認與230 V/50 Hz的電壓額定值兼容性。持有IEC 61727電能質量測試報告的CGC認證中國逆變器在MEPE項目層面審批中處於有利地位。本比較僅供參考。
